full_text:
Tumor tissue was cut and dissociated using Dispase. For 19.4 mL of AdF+++ medium, I used 400 uL Dispase, and 200 uL DNAse. Incubated in the oven for 30 min; RBC lysis buffer 4 mL + 20 mL of AdF+++ medium. After centrifuge, I resuspended cells in 3 mL of iPDS medium, and counted the cells.

Assel Kalmenova performed the tissue dissociation, and freezing the final cells in stemcell banker.

Ashwini Nagaraj performed plating of the cells in OmGel for drug treatments in 48 and 384 well plates.

Dispase dissociated cells:

Cell count/ml 1):

total: 1.06 E7

live: 6.21 E6

viability: 58.6 %

size: 8.2 um

Cell count /ml 2):

total: 1.14 E7

live: 7.02 E6

viability: 61.4 %

size: 7.9 um

Total cell count: 33 E6

Total volume: 3 mL

Overall # of cells in 3 mL was 33 E6.

I took 2 E6 cells (in 2 Eppendorf tubes) for flow cytometry staining, 4 E6 cells were seeded in 48-well and 384-well plates for drug experiments, and the rest (27E6) was seeded in 3 cryovials (9 E6 / vial, each containing 9E6 cells.

A). Drug treatment for flow cytometry (48 well plate)

11 conditions, 6 replicates per condition =66wells

66 wells x 40

1000 cells/µl = 1.0 E6 * 4 tubes

4 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 1000 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension:

743

141 µl

µl

µl

µl

Plate 40 uL per well in 48 well plate * 4 see the map below.

300 uL medium + 50 ul of diluted drugs per well same day for ATRi and ATXi combinations and next day for anti-TIGIT combinations.

B) Drug treatment for IF (384 well plate):

20 uL per well of the omentum gel mixture prepared above was plated in 384 well plate. The gel was allowed to solidify for 1hr in the cell culture incubator, followed by addition of 25 ul of culture medium per well. Followed by dispensing of the drugs using TECAN drug dispense

For ATXi and ATRi single and combination treatment for flow cytometry analysis

x on 48 well plate = 6 x 50 uL = 300 uL (prepare 600uL)

(!) c1v1 = c2v2 -> c1 x 10 uL = c2 x v2

IC50 of ATRi (Berzosertib (VE-822) is 19 nM on cell lines (https://www.selleckchem.com/products/ve-822.html)

Stock concentration of ATRi is 10mM, dilute to 0.1 mM in DMSO and used for further dilutions indicated in this table for 48 well plates.

Dilute to 1mM for 384 well plate

IC50 of ATXi Ziritaxestat (GLPG1690) is 130 nM on cell lines (https://www.medchemexpress.com/GLPG1690.html)

Stock concentration of ATXi is 1mM, dilute to 0.1 mM (for 48 well plate), and 1mM for (384 well plate) in DMSO and use it for further dilutions indicated in this table

Prepare 3 mg /mL pembrolizumab for treatment in 384 well plate

Prepare 0.75% Tween 20 in 1xPBS = 75uL tween 20 + 10 mL of 1x PBS

Dilute stock Pembrolizumab (5mg/mL) to get a final concentration of 0. 3% tween 20 = 15uL of stock pembrolizumab + 10mL of 0.75 % Tween 20.

On day

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.1 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.146
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
